description_long: This is a compact, futuristic airplane with a predominantly red and white color scheme, featuring a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and a black-tinted, forward-mounted cockpit canopy. The wings are sharply angled with upward-canted winglets, giving the aircraft a dynamic, aggressive appearance. Four large, circular jet engines are mounted at the rear, with glowing purple exhausts suggesting high-powered propulsion. The tail section is distinctive, with twin vertical stabilizers set at an outward angle, connected by a horizontal stabilizer. The landing gear appears to be fixed and minimal, with small struts visible beneath the wings. The overall design suggests a high-speed, agile craft suitable for advanced urban or sci-fi environments.
description: A sleek, red and white futuristic airplane with a black cockpit, four glowing rear jet engines, and sharply angled wings with upward winglets. Twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers and minimal landing gear complete its agile, high-tech look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black cockpit canopy, pointed nose, and the wide, sharply angled wings with upward winglets.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated fuselage, forward cockpit, and the stacked arrangement of the rear jet engines.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the four large, glowing jet engines, twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the engine placement, wing structure, and cockpit profile.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and upward-canted winglets; slight anhedral angle present.
attribute_engine_type: Quad jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin outward-canted vertical stabilizers and a connecting horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a black-tinted canopy integrated into the fuselage nose.
